{{Quote|Myra's tentacles, son — you can do ''anyt'ing'' to one of those babies and it'll keep running, just as smoot; and easy as the day you got her. Maybe that's why we love 'em so.|Lars Refken|<ref name="Stock" />}}
'''Rars Lefken''' was the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] ''[[Lefken's Dreams]]''. He was bearded and had a thick mop of [[Hair/Legends|hair]], with a creature living in it. At some point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Lefken talked with a companion in a [[Cantina/Legends|bar]] about how stock light [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] could differ widely after [[Standard year/Legends|years]] and [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of use.<ref name="Stock" /> At some point while traveling along the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]], Lefken ran afoul of [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] enforcers while drunk. His injuries were severe enough that it was three [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] before [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droids]] in a neighboring [[Star system/Legends|system]] cleared him to fly.<ref name="Sisar">''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]''</ref>
